title: senecio johnstonii var. cheranganiensis
intro: Senecio johnstonii var. cheranganiensis, also known as Cherangani Hill Groundsel, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Kenya. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Cherangani Hill Groundsel can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
